scanCameraUnavailable: The camera is unavailable. Choose another source.
noRewardsHint: Check back later for new offers

recycling.ready: Use your location to find nearby options.
recycling.locationUnavailable: Location unavailable. Open the official map instead.
recycling.unavailable: Recycling map is unavailable. Try the official map.
recycling.empty: No nearby points found. Try the official map.

agent.title: ReAgent
agent.suggestionSortingPrompt: How should I recycle this item?
agent.photoPrompt: How should I recycle this item?
agent.decisionPrompt: Should I keep, repair, or replace {item}? Check relevant records with my permission.
agent.imageTooLarge: The photo must be 10 MB or smaller.
agent.imageAnalysisFailed: I could not analyze that photo. Try another image or describe the item.
agent.locationBody: Allow ReAgent to use your current location once for this request. Your coordinates are not shown in the chat.
agent.recordsRequest: Allow access to relevant recycling records for this request?
agent.notConfigured: Agent is not configured on this server.
agent.safetyBlocked: I can't help with unsafe requests or requests that try to bypass permissions. Ask me a safe recycling question instead.
agent.safetyUnavailable: The safety check is temporarily unavailable. No Agent tools were run.
agent.consentBody: Your messages, attached photos, and selected item context may be processed by the AI and safety providers configured by this service. Chat history, a compact long-term memory, and goal plans are stored with your account so ReAgent can continue across devices. ReAgent only reads other account data after a separate approval.
agent.memoryClearConfirm: Clear saved long-term memory and goal plans?
agent.recordsBody: Allow this ReAgent run to read a bounded summary of relevant recycling records for this request.

warning.typhoonBody: A tropical cyclone warning is in force. Secure loose items, avoid exposed waterfronts, and check official advice before going out.
warning.weatherBody: Bad weather warning is in force. Check conditions before going out and keep recycling plans flexible.

default.title: Hong Kong weather
default.body: Small habits make the city easier to breathe in. Recycle what you can and keep the air cleaner.

Rainy day.title: Rainy day
Rainy day.body: Too much greenhouse gas traps more heat and moisture. Recycling helps keep the buildup in check.

Sunny day.title: Sunny day
Sunny day.body: If you want more days like this, keep recycling so the Earth stays lighter and cleaner.

Hazy air.title: Hazy air
Hazy air.body: When the air hangs heavy, every recycled item helps reduce the pressure on the atmosphere.

Cloudy day.title: Cloudy day
Cloudy day.body: Grey skies still deserve a cleaner city. Small recycling habits add up faster than they look.

Hot day.title: Hot day
Hot day.body: Hotter days are easier to live with when we cut waste and emissions together. Recycle what you can.

Cool day.title: Cool day
Cool day.body: Cool weather feels better when we keep carbon down. Recycling is one small part of that.

Windy day.title: Windy day
Windy day.body: Fresh wind feels better when the air stays clean. Recycling helps keep the long game on track.

Safety first.title: Safety first
Safety first.body: Leave recycling trips for calmer weather. Keep loose recyclables indoors so they do not become flying debris.

rewardsSub: Convert your choices into real-world action.

facts.aluminum-can-energy: Recycling a single aluminum can saves enough energy to power a TV for 3 hours.
facts.hong-kong-daily-waste: Hong Kong generates over 15,000 tonnes of municipal solid waste every day.
facts.tree-carbon-absorption: One tree can absorb up to 22 kg of CO2 per year.
facts.plastic-bottle-decomposition: Plastic bottles take up to 450 years to decompose.
facts.hong-kong-food-waste: Food waste accounts for 30% of Hong Kong's municipal solid waste.
facts.glass-endless-recycling: Glass is 100% recyclable and can be recycled endlessly without quality loss.

tree-plant.title: Plant a Native Tree in a Hong Kong Country Park
tree-plant.description: Sponsor a native sapling in Tai Lam or Sai Kung Country Park.

fairprice-voucher.title: Supermarket HK$30 Cash Voucher
fairprice-voucher.description: Valid at participating supermarkets across Hong Kong.

mtr-ride.title: MTR Single Journey Ticket
mtr-ride.description: One free adult single journey on any MTR urban line.

starbucks-treat.title: Coffee Shop HK$25 eGift
starbucks-treat.description: Redeemable for a drink at participating coffee shops in Hong Kong.

ocean-cleanup.title: Sponsor 1 kg of Ocean Cleanup
ocean-cleanup.description: Fund the removal of 1 kg of marine plastic from Hong Kong coastal waters.

reusable-kit.title: Reusable Eco Starter Kit
reusable-kit.description: Bamboo cutlery, beeswax wrap, and an organic cotton tote bag.

commitment1: Bring reusable tote bag on grocery trips.
commitment2: Separate compost scraps from general trash.
policyText: Re-Life is committed to preserving local smart waste databases.
